title: Hide teams list and board members from guests.
excerpt:
We work with a number of contractors who we would like to hide the identities of these team members from each other. Primarily this could be done be restricting guests from accessing 
the team and board member lists.

posts.author: ddavis (Daniel Davis)
posts.cookedHtml:
We work with a number of contractors who we would like to hide the identities of these team members from each other. Primarily this could be done be restricting guests from accessing
the team and board member lists.
